title: Pounds to Kilograms Converter (Industrial Grade)
description: Industrial-grade conversion tool with mass-based loss analysis, confidence adjustment, and action recommendations per ISO 80000-1 and Lean Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Mass in Pounds (lb)
inputs.businessContext: Input mass value in pounds for conversion to kilograms. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and material handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Input mass value in pounds for conversion to kilograms. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and material handling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilograma dönüştürmek için pound cinsinden kütle değeri girin. Lojistik, imalat ve malzeme taşıma işlemlerinde kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Massenwert in Pfund für die Umrechnung in Kilogramm ein. Wird in Logistik, Fertigung und Materialhandhabung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Saisissez la masse en livres pour la conversion en kilogrammes. Utilisé en logistique, fabrication et manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el valor de masa en libras para convertir a kilogramos. Se utiliza en logística, fabricación y manejo de materiales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أدخل قيمة الكتلة بالرطل للتحويل إلى كيلوغرام. يُستخدم في اللوجستيات والتصنيع ومناولة المواد.

inputs.label: Precision Level (Decimal Places)
inputs.businessContext: Select the number of decimal places for the output. Higher precision for laboratory or quality control (ISO 17025).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the number of decimal places for the output. Higher precision for laboratory or quality control (ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısını seçin. Laboratuvar veya kalite kontrol (ISO 17025) için daha yüksek hassasiyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe. Höhere Genauigkeit für Labor- oder Qualitätskontrolle (ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez le nombre de décimales pour le résultat. Précision supérieure pour laboratoire ou contrôle qualité (ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione el número de decimales para el resultado. Mayor precisión para laboratorio o control de calidad (ISO 17025).
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر عدد المنازل العشرية للمخرجات. دقة أعلى للمختبر أو مراقبة الجودة (ISO 17025).

inputs.label: Rounding Method
inputs.businessContext: Rounding method per ASTM E29 or ISO 80000-1. Standard rounding (half up) is default for most industrial applications.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rounding method per ASTM E29 or ISO 80000-1. Standard rounding (half up) is default for most industrial applications.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ASTM E29 veya ISO 80000-1'e göre yuvarlama yöntemi. Standart yuvarlama (yarıdan yukarı) çoğu endüstriyel uygulama için varsayılandır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Rundungsmethode nach ASTM E29 oder ISO 80000-1. Standardrundung (kaufmännisch) ist Standard für die meisten industriellen Anwendungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Méthode d'arrondi selon ASTM E29 ou ISO 80000-1. L'arrondi standard (demi au supérieur) est par défaut pour la plupart des applications industrielles.
businessContext_i18n.es: Método de redondeo según ASTM E29 o ISO 80000-1. El redondeo estándar (mitad hacia arriba) es el predeterminado para la mayoría de aplicaciones industriales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طريقة التقريب وفقًا لـ ASTM E29 أو ISO 80000-1. التقريب القياسي (نصف لأعلى) هو الافتراضي لمعظم التطبيقات الصناعية.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Loss Analysis
inputs.businessContext: Enable to calculate potential mass loss due to moisture, measurement error, or material handling (Lean Six Sigma waste analysis).

businessContext_i18n.en: Enable to calculate potential mass loss due to moisture, measurement error, or material handling (Lean Six Sigma waste analysis).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nem, ölçüm hatası veya malzeme taşıma nedeniyle oluşan potansiyel kütle kaybını hesaplamak için etkinleştirin (Yalın Altı Sigma israf analizi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktivieren, um potenziellen Massenverlust durch Feuchtigkeit, Messfehler oder Materialhandhabung zu berechnen (Lean Six Sigma Verschwendungsanalyse).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Activer pour calculer la perte de masse potentielle due à l'humidité, l'erreur de mesure ou la manutention (analyse des gaspillages Lean Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Active para calcular la pérdida potencial de masa debido a humedad, error de medición o manejo de materiales (análisis de desperdicio Lean Seis Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.ar: فعّل لحساب فقدان الكتلة المحتمل بسبب الرطوبة أو خطأ القياس أو مناولة المواد (تحليل هدر اللين سيجما).

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a percentage of the mass value. Based on calibration data (ISO 17025, GUM).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated measurement uncertainty as a percentage of the mass value. Based on calibration data (ISO 17025, GUM).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kütle değerinin yüzdesi olarak tahmini ölçüm belirsizliği. Kalibrasyon verilerine dayanır (ISO 17025, GUM).
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Messunsicherheit als Prozentsatz des Massenwerts. Basierend auf Kalibrierdaten (ISO 17025, GUM).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude de mesure estimée en pourcentage de la valeur de masse. Basée sur les données d'étalonnage (ISO 17025, GUM).
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre de medición estimada como porcentaje del valor de masa. Basada en datos de calibración (ISO 17025, GUM).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدم يقين القياس المقدر كنسبة مئوية من قيمة الكتلة. بناءً على بيانات المعايرة (ISO 17025, GUM).

inputs.label: Material Type (for loss factor)
inputs.businessContext: Material type influences hidden loss factors (e.g., moisture absorption for hygroscopic materials, spillage for powders).

label_i18n.fr: Type de matériau (pour facteur de perte)
label_i18n.es: Tipo de Material (para factor de pérdida)

businessContext_i18n.en: Material type influences hidden loss factors (e.g., moisture absorption for hygroscopic materials, spillage for powders).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme türü, görünmeyen kayıp faktörlerini etkiler (örneğin, higroskopik malzemeler için nem emilimi, tozlar için dökülme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Materialtyp beeinflusst die Faktoren für verborgenen Verlust (z. B. Feuchtigkeitsaufnahme bei hygroskopischen Materialien, Verschütten bei Pulvern).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le type de matériau influence les facteurs de perte cachée (ex. absorption d'humidité pour les matériaux hygroscopiques, déversement pour les poudres).
businessContext_i18n.es: El tipo de material influye en los factores de pérdida oculta (ej., absorción de humedad para materiales higroscópicos, derrame para polvos).
businessContext_i18n.ar: يؤثر نوع المادة على عوامل الخسائر غير المرئية (مثل امتصاص الرطوبة للمواد الاسترطابية، الانسكاب للمساحيق).

rules.message: Mass in pounds must be a non-negative value.
Measurement uncertainty must be between 0% and 10%.
Precision level must be between 0 and 6 decimal places.

rules.condition: include_loss_analysis == false OR (include_loss_analysis == true AND material_type != 'general')
rules.message: When loss analysis is enabled, material type must be specified (not 'general').

thresholds.message: Mass exceeds 50,000 lb. Verify scale capacity and handling equipment per OSHA 1910.179.
Measurement uncertainty > 2%. Recalibration recommended per ISO 17025.
Mass is zero. Conversion will yield zero kilograms.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
